chat.inputPlaceholder_ready: Write a prompt or enter a command (zoom, rotate, reset...)
chat.welcome: Welcome to Synthetic Image Studio! Please select an AI model above and enter your API key. Then write a prompt to generate images.

errors.noModel: ⚠️ Please select an AI model first.
errors.noApiKey: 🔑 Please enter a valid API key. Your key should start with "sk-" and be at least 10 characters long.
errors.generationFailed:
❌ Error ({{retries}} retries): {{message}}

Please check your API key or try a different prompt.

chat.generationSuccess: ✅ Image generated successfully! You can use Keep below to save to your project or Discard to delete.

commands.reset: ✅ Viewer reset: zoom, rotation and filters back to default.

viewer.noImageSubtitle: Write a prompt and click Send

modelSelector.clearKey: Remove API key (also clears from localStorage)

stable-diffusion-xl.description: High quality, open source AI model. 1024x1024

flux-schnell.name: Flux Schnell
flux-schnell.description: Black Forest Labs - Fast and high quality, open model

flux-pro.name: Flux Pro
flux-pro.description: Black Forest Labs - Premium quality image generation

saveDialog.step_project: Select the project to save images to.
saveDialog.step_dataset: Select a dataset within the project.
saveDialog.step_uploading: Adding images to S3 upload queue...
saveDialog.noProjects: You don't have any projects yet. Create a project first.
saveDialog.noDatasets: This project has no datasets yet.
saveDialog.backgroundNote: Upload will continue in the background. You can monitor progress in
saveDialog.completeDesc: Your images are being uploaded to S3 storage. You can track the upload status via the Upload Manager in the bottom right corner.

bulkManager.title: Bulk Image Upload Simulator
bulkManager.actionsDesc: Approve or reject all selected images at once for endpoint testing.

toast.success: {{count}} new images successfully uploaded to your synthetic pool!
